problem id: 780bf5c8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: NOT AND SHR(7)

examples:
  11000011 -> 00000000
  01000010 -> 00000000
  11000101 -> 00000000
  00101101 -> 00000000
  11001111 -> 00000000
  01101110 -> 00000000
  10101110 -> 00000001
  10111110 -> 00000001

query: 00100001
predicted answer: 00000000
